scenes.title: The cells
scenes.biggestGap: The clerk sequence briefly resolves into abstract procedure instead of staying with sand, page, and the visible habits of record-taking.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: adjacent dungeon cells directly below the tribunal wing and evidence vault
sceneContract.materialAnchor: cold flagstones, mortar seams, chain, grate light, blanket wool, and sanded pages on the clerk's board
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads acoustics, gait, and bureaucratic fear through stone and posture instead of speculation
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: breath, chain rasp, pen, sand, palm to wall, torch hiss
sceneContract.exitAnchor: vault pressure felt through the foundations

scenes.title: The trial
scenes.biggestGap: Several courtroom beats still try to summarize what the room means instead of keeping pressure in benches, pages, cloth, rails, and visible reactions.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: tribunal hall under the same palace roof and near the sealed evidence vault
sceneContract.materialAnchor: bench wood, aisle guards, chains, desk papers, lead chest, ward paste, clerk pots, gallery cloth, witness rail
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas tracks consequence through Thornton's hands, Ashcombe's movement, and the gallery's physical tells
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: page turns, glove leather, chair arms, bench creak, witness rail, pen scratch
sceneContract.exitAnchor: the guilty word translating instantly into chain and escorted descent

scenes.title: The betrayals
scenes.biggestGap: The verdict sequence and post-verdict reading can still drift into label-language when the chapter needs Thornton's voice, the order of commutation, and the guards' timing to carry the brutality.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: same tribunal chamber with the gallery and witness chair still active
sceneContract.materialAnchor: sealed document, witness rail, ledgers, bench wood, visible breath, chains tightening after the ruling
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads failure through posture, omissions, and the exact language used to cage the two women alive
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: empty witness chair, vellum edges, paused pens, formal ruling cadence, guards moving on the guilty word
sceneContract.exitAnchor: verdict arriving as procedure, not melodrama

scenes.title: The aftermath
scenes.biggestGap: The chapter close briefly resolves through emotional labeling and summary when it needs failed humor, guard attention, bars, and corridor consequence.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: return to the same cells with the vault and lower court directly above and beyond
sceneContract.materialAnchor: frost on blanket edge, blue torch base, bars, chain, road dust on boots, guard eyes on the corridor
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas values corroboration, timing, and leverage over hope-language
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: taps through mortar, hand through bars, shackle grip, failed joke, corridor footsteps
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Lor'themar heading toward the colder dark above while the changed corridor keeps watching
